name: Blocknative Web3 Transaction Infrastructure API
what_it_does: Blockchain transaction infrastructure API providing real-time mempool monitoring, gas price estimation, MEV protection, and wallet transaction notifications — enabling agents to monitor pending transactions and optimize transaction submission.
use_cases: Monitoring mempool for pending transactions from specific addresses or contracts
Getting accurate gas price predictions for transaction optimization
Receiving real-time notifications when transactions confirm or fail via webhooks
Protecting transactions from MEV attacks via private mempool submission
Analyzing pending transaction flow for DeFi trading and arbitrage agents
not_for: General blockchain data queries without mempool focus (use Alchemy or QuickNode)
Historical blockchain data analytics (use Dune or The Graph)
best_when: An agent needs real-time mempool visibility for transaction optimization, gas estimation, or MEV protection in DeFi or trading workflows.
avoid_when: You need historical data or general blockchain RPC access without mempool-specific needs.

auth.notes: API key from Blocknative account. Passed as header for REST API calls. WebSocket connection authenticated via API key. Account-scoped access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: limited mempool events and API calls
pricing.notes: Event-based pricing for mempool monitoring. Gas estimation API more affordable. High-volume DeFi use cases require enterprise pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Event limits per plan; WebSocket for real-time without polling

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST and WebSocket API documentation. Gas API for price estimation well-documented. Webhook delivery for transaction confirmation events. Error responses include failure reasons.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Gas estimation reads are idempotent. Webhook subscription setup is idempotent. Mempool queries are stateless reads.
known_agent_gotchas: Mempool data is real-time — missed events don't have catch-up mechanism
WebSocket connection required for real-time updates — not REST polling friendly
Gas estimation accuracy depends on current network conditions — volatile markets reduce accuracy
MEV protection features have specific transaction format requirements

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. WebSocket TLS secured. No formal compliance certifications. US data residency. Mempool data is public by nature — security focus on API access control.
